title: Whisper WER floor check

normalization.rationale: Whisper inserts commas, periods, leading spaces; LibriSpeech refs are punctuation-free uppercase. Raw WER is inflated by these insertions.

clean.ref: she taught her daughter then by her own affection for it that love for a country where they had both been hospitably received and where a brilliant future opened before them
clean.hyp: she taught her daughter, then, by her own affection for it, that love for a country where they had both been hospitably received and where a brilliant future opened for them.

noisy.ref: concord returned to its place amidst the tents
noisy.hyp: concorde returned to its place amidst the tents.

phase3_implications: All Phase 3 WER scripts must apply punctuation normalization before jiwer.wer().
whisper-small is sufficient — no upgrade to whisper-medium needed.
Noisy WER margin (0.032 vs 0.25 bar) means SNR 10 dB inputs are safe for the pipeline.
